form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran last of 7 at Lingfield All Weather on February 27 over 1200m, 4 len behind Fast Track Harry with 54kg at $26. Last start 7th of 16 at Doncaster on March 29 over 1400m, 4 len behind Jimmy Speaking carrying 62kg at $15. Rates highly and can break through.

form.formComment: Most recently 6th of 11 at this track on March 20 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Dark Ace carrying 59.5kg at $9.50. The start before that 3rd of 8 at this track on February 16 over 1200m, 2 len behind Silky Wilkie carrying 61kg at $5. Can atone.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 12 at this track November 3 over 1200m, 5 len behind Zoulu Chief carrying 58.5kg at $5. When resuming last campaign ran last of 8 at Great Yarmouth September 17 over 1200m, soft track; 8 len behind Kosometsuke with 61kg at $10. Great chance.

form.formComment: Most recently second last of 9 at Chelmsford on March 26 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Gold Star Hero carrying 57.5kg at $10. The run before that won by a nose at Kempton Park All Weather March 4 over 1200m defeating Daring Legend carrying 54kg at $4.30. Looks tested again.

form.formComment: Most recently 3rd of 9 at Chelmsford on March 26 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Gold Star Hero with 58kg at $7. The start before that 5th of 8 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 4 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Lazzar carrying 55.5kg at $3. Wasn?t too far off the mark last time. Not far from the winner last time and cannot be underestimated.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Denied a clear run inside final furlong.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 5th of 9 at Chelmsford on March 26 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Gold Star Hero with 60.5kg at $6. Previously second-up 5th of 22 at York on May 31 over 1400m, 2.25 len behind Frankies Dream carrying 57.5kg at $7.50. Rates highly and is among the leading hopes.

form.formComment: Returns from a 34-day let-up. Last start 2nd in a small field at Chelmsford on March 7 over 1200m, neck behind Tyger Bay carrying 60.5kg at $9. Before that of 8 at Kempton Park All Weather on January 14 over 1200m, 4 len behind Serenity Dream with 58.5kg at $9.50. Leading prospect.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Upon leaving the stalls, intimidated off its intended racing line.

form.formComment: Most recently second last of 9 at this track on March 20 over 1000m, 6 len behind Moe's Legacy with 61kg at $4. The run before that 2nd of 10 at this track on March 7 over 1220m, 1.3 len behind Knebworth carrying 53kg at $67. Looking to others.
